name: giftshop
description: House of Return Gift - Full Stack MERN E-commerce

scripts.install-all: cd api && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build-client: cd client && npm run build && (xcopy dist\* ..\dist\ /E /Y /I 2>nul & xcopy dist\* ..\api\public\ /E /Y /I 2>nul || (cp -r dist/* ../dist/ && cp -r dist/* ../api/public/))
scripts.build: npm run install-all && npm run build-client
